titleStmt.title: SII 25.57: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 57. (A.R. No. 57 of 1908.) VAḺUVŪR, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Brahmapurīśvara temple.
This epigraph may be assigned on palaeographical grounds to about the 13th century A.D.

It records the gift of 32 cows and a bull by Śeṅgēṇi Vīrapperumāḷ alias Kulōttuṅga-Śambuvarāyaṉ for maintaining a perpetual lamp to the deity Tiruvayanīśuram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Vaḻugūr in Veṇkuṉṟak-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam. The maṉṟāḍis Periyanāṭṭukkōṉ, Ayanīśurakkōṉ and Parambakkōṉ undertook the gift and agreed to maintain the lamp by the supply of ghee measured by Rājakēsari-uḻakku.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī rāja rājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 7āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭa
lattu veṇkuṉṟak koṭṭattu vaḻukūr tiruvayaṉicuramuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku ceṅkeṇi vira
pperumāḷāṉa kulottuṅka coḻac campuvarāyaṉeṉ Ināyaṉāṟku tirunuṉtāviḷakku Oṉṟukku viṭṭa pacu mu
p pattiraṇṭum Iṣapam 1 Oṉṟum Ivūr maṉṟāṭi periyanāṭṭuk koṉ ciṟṟi Ayaṉicurakkoṉum parampak ko
ṉ naṅkaṉāṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyirakkoṉum Ivviruvom Ippacu muppattiraṇṭum Iṣapa
m Oṉṟum cāvā muvāp perum pacuvākak kaikkoṇṭu Irācakecari Uḻakkāle nāḷ Oṉ
ṟukku Uḻakku neyyāka vanta ney cantirātittavarai Aḷakka kaṭavom Ivviruvom Itu bhanmākecura Irakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 25.57 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
